transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, First National Bank. This is Daniel. Before we begin, could I take your full name and date of birth for security?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Of course. It's Priya Mehta, twenty-second of November 1990.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Priya, identity confirmed. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: So I got a new card issued about a week ago — I had to replace my old one — and it just hasn't come through yet. Is that normal?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's a really common concern. Delivery is five to seven working days from dispatch. Let me check where yours is in the process.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I just want to make sure it's not lost or sent to the wrong place.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Completely understandable. I can see it was dispatched four days ago, so you're well within the window. The card was sent to the address ending in Birch Road — is that right?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're in good shape. I'd expect it to arrive tomorrow or the day after. If you reach next Tuesday and it still hasn't arrived, call us and we'll issue a new one same day with tracked post.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: My pleasure. I've added a note to your account for reference. Anything else today?
